revision.comment: Replace {{[[Template:CatPair|CatPair]]}} or {{[[Template:CatRel|CatRel]]}} with {{[[Template:Navseasoncats|Navseasoncats]]}} (avoid gaps > navbar size & successive name mismatches)
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia categories
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Buddhism by century|People]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:12th century in religion|Budd]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
